ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the user registered on the platform */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., regular, organizer, admin) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the user */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user for contact purposes */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the user */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile picture */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Short biography or description of the user */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if the user's account is active */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "activities" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of the activity (e.g., sports, religious, nature) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the activity */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the activity */,
  "age_restriction" INTEGER /* Age restriction for the activity */,
  "cost" TEXT /* Cost associated with the activity */,
  "location" TEXT /* Default location for the activity */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the activity */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum number of participants for the activity */,
  "is_recurring" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if the activity is recurring */,
  "recurring_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of recurrence (e.g., weekly, monthly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_engagements" (
  "engagement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each engagement record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user engaging in the activity */,
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the activity being engaged with */,
  "engagement_score" INTEGER /* Score reflecting the level of engagement (e.g., number of participations) */,
  "engagement_date" TEXT /* Date of the engagement */,
  "engagement_type" TEXT /* Type of engagement (e.g., participation, view, like) */,
  "engagement_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the engagement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("engagement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_engagements_activity_id FOREIGN KEY ("activity_id") REFERENCES activities ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_engagements_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user providing feedback */,
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the activity being rated */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given to the activity (1-5 scale) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* User comments on the activity */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date the feedback was given */,
  "is_anonymous" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if the feedback is anonymous */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_activity_id FOREIGN KEY ("activity_id") REFERENCES activities ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recommendation */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the recommendation */,
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recommended activity */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the recommendation */,
  "recommended_date" TEXT /* Date the recommendation was made */,
  "recommended_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user or system that made the recommendation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_activity_id FOREIGN KEY ("activity_id") REFERENCES activities ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_recommended_by FOREIGN KEY ("recommended_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_preferences" (
  "preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each preference record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the preferred activity */,
  "preference_level" INTEGER /* Level of preference (scale 1-10) */,
  "preference_date" TEXT /* Date the preference was set */,
  "preference_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the preference */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_activity_id FOREIGN KEY ("activity_id") REFERENCES activities ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_organizers" (
  "organizer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each organizer */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who is an organizer */,
  "organization_name" TEXT /* Name of the organization they represent */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the organizer */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the organizer */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL to the organizer's website */,
  "is_verified" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if the organizer is verified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("organizer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_organizers_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "activity_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the activity type */,
  "organizer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the organizer conducting the event */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the event will take place */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the event */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the event */,
  "registration_deadline" TEXT /* Deadline for registration */,
  "is_private" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if the event is private */,
  "is_free" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if the event is free */,
  "current_participants" INTEGER /* Current number of participants */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activity_events_activity_id FOREIGN KEY ("activity_id") REFERENCES activities ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activity_events_organizer_id FOREIGN KEY ("organizer_id") REFERENCES event_organizers ("organizer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_events" (
  "user_event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-event record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user participating */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event being participated in */,
  "participation_status" TEXT /* Status of participation (e.g., registered, attended, cancelled) */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the user registered for the event */,
  "cancellation_date" TEXT /* Date the user cancelled participation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_events_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES activity_events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_events_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_feedback" (
  "event_feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event being rated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user providing feedback */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given to the event (1-5 scale) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* User comments on the event */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date the feedback was given */,
  "is_anonymous" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if the feedback is anonymous */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_feedback_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES activity_events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_engagement_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trend record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the activity type */,
  "period" TEXT /* Time period for the trend (e.g., monthly, yearly) */,
  "engagement_score" INTEGER /* Aggregated engagement score for the period */,
  "trend_type" TEXT /* Type of trend (e.g., weekly, monthly, yearly) */,
  "engagement_change" INTEGER /* Change in engagement score compared to the previous period */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_engagement_trends_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_engagement_trends_activity_id FOREIGN KEY ("activity_id") REFERENCES activities ("activity_id")
)
